title: Bee Removal in Pelham Bay, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Pelham Bay, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Serving homes and businesses near Pelham Bay Park. Call today for $350-$550 flat-rate service.
intro: Pelham Bay residents know that our neighborhood's proximity to Pelham Bay Park and abundant green spaces makes it a haven for bees seeking nesting sites in homes and businesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, professional bee removal services throughout Pelham Bay, from the waterfront communities near City Island Bridge to the residential blocks along Westchester Avenue. Our experienced technicians handle everything from small swarms to established hives with care and efficiency.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Pelham Bay for years, understanding the unique challenges of this northeastern Bronx neighborhood with its mix of single-family homes, apartment buildings, and proximity to natural habitats. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, offer transparent pricing of $350-$550, and provide same-day or next-day service to protect your family and property.
localContext: Pelham Bay's tree-lined streets, gardens near St. Theresa Church, and older homes throughout the neighborhood create ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish themselves in eaves, chimneys, and wall cavities. Properties near Pelham Bay Park and along the Hutchinson River Parkway are especially prone to bee activity during spring and summer months when colonies are most active.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service in Pelham Bay ranges from $350 to $550 depending on the size and location of the hive, accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide upfront pricing after a brief assessment with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Pelham Bay home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service throughout Pelham Bay. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment at your convenience and typically complete the removal within a few hours, ensuring your property is safe and bee-free.

faqs.question: Do you use humane bee removal methods?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize humane bee removal whenever possible. Our technicians safely relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them, working with local beekeepers when appropriate. We only use elimination methods when relocation poses safety risks or is not feasible.

faqs.question: What areas of Pelham Bay do you service for bee removal?
faqs.answer: We service all of Pelham Bay including areas near Pelham Bay Park, City Island Road, Westchester Avenue, Middletown Road, and all residential neighborhoods from the waterfront to the Hutchinson River Parkway. No location in Pelham Bay is too far for our expert bee removal team.
